---
title: "Exercise 4. Images, videos and documents"
---

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aTVfJk6yNKs&list=PL4ta8RxZklWk_O_Z7K0bZlhmHtaH73vlh>}}


<iframe width="100%" height="500" src="https://quarto.org/" title="Quarto Documentation"></iframe>



<embed src="example.pdf" width="100%" height="1000px" />
